item.title: Mark Webber slams speculation over Oscar Piastri future: ‘Nonsense’
item.description: The Aussie manager has had enough and made his thoughts on the matter crystal clear.

item.title: Capital gains tax and negative gearing: First home buyers and investors have their say on government reforms
item.description: Will the controversial changes deliver what they set out to achieve?

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter, Brooke Warne, gets engaged to Alex Heath
item.description: ‘He will be over the moon celebrating.’

item.title: Middle East tensions leave door open for extension of fuel excise cuts
item.description: The discount Aussies are getting at the bowser is due to run out on August 2.

item.title: Toy Story 5 pitches devices against traditional play but expert says age of toys ‘not over’
item.description: The latest film in the cult animated series taps into a ‘modern anxiety’ for parents with a cautionary tale, but are those concerns unnecessarily inflated?

item.title: US expects Iran to issue public statement declaring Strait of Hormuz open
item.description: Commercial shipping through the key route remains severely disrupted.

item.title: Telstra insiders say outage caused by old server that could have been replaced for less than $30,000
item.description: ‘We’ve commenced a full investigation into this incident.’

item.title: Wimbledon champion Linda Noskova pays emotional tribute to late mum after wild final against Karolina Muchova
item.description: There were tears all over Centre Court after two friends rode a rollercoaster that featured a tennis meltdown and ended with a beautiful memory.

item.title: Aussie UFC veteran Robert Whittaker says ‘Bobby’s still got it’ after bone-crunching first win at light heavyweight
item.description: The former champion’s victim threw in the towel when he ‘immediately reacted like ‘my jaw is broken’’.

item.title: UFC rocked as injured Conor McGregor forced to quit seconds into comeback fight against Max Holloway
item.description: The hype train crashed after the controversial star attempted a ‘crazy’ move to start the fight.

item.title: Michelle Payne shares baby joy in surprise pregnancy announcement
item.description: The 40-year-old shared the ‘little love’ news in a surprise social media post.

item.title: US senator Lindsey ‌Graham dies aged 71
item.description: The one-time critic turned ally of Donald Trump died after a brief and sudden illness.

item.title: Brodie Kostecki dodges early chaos to blitz Supercars victory at Townsville 500
item.description: The DJR star came from behind pole to atone for his frustrations earlier in the weekend.

item.title: Perth grandfather Lyle Lambie loses $300,000 and home to devastating romance scam
item.description: The 80-year-old is speaking out to save others from the same heartbreak.

item.title: Bombshell as Brendon McCullum sacked as England Test coach
item.description: The Bazball era appears all but over with the coach following Ben Stokes out the door.

item.title: Massive fire erupts at pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people
item.description: Shocking footage circulating online shows the huge blaze raging and plumes of smoke pouring out of the pub’s front door.

item.title: Cruz Hewitt’s ‘special’ run to Wimbledon final ends in heartbreak against Jordan Lee
item.description: The 17-year-old’s disappointment was palpable even as Lleyton and Bec lifted him up after a brilliant week.

item.title: World No.1 Jannik Sinner checks on Alexander Zverev in moment of pure class on his way to Wimbledon win
item.description: The superstar was ruthless on his way to back-to-back titles, but he knew exactly what he had to do when his hurting rival hit the deck.

item.title: Long-awaited change coming to arrival forms at Australia’s international airports
item.description: The move has been hailed a ‘win’ for travellers.

item.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham’s likely cause of death revealed after Donald Trump claims he was ‘perfect’
item.description: The US Senator had only just returned from Ukraine when he suddenly died.

item.title: Chef Zach Green celebrates NAIDOC Week with a flavour-packed chilli mud crab curry
item.description: This vibrant mango mud crab curry proves native ingredients deserve a place in every Australian kitchen.

item.title: Sarah Di Lorenzo shares healthy homemade snack swaps for the school holidays
item.description: From homemade fruit roll-ups to crispy veggie chips and cheesy chicken pinwheels, Sarah Di Lorenzo shares healthier snack ideas the whole family can enjoy.

item.title: Singer Brandy issues lengthy statement after facing body-shaming
item.description: ‘Everyone is carrying a story we cannot see.’

item.title: Junction Oval to host historic Big Bash League clash on Christmas Eve
item.description: The Big Bash will break new ground this year to give fans an early Christmas present.

item.title: AFL trade bombshell as Geelong make bold play for Essendon veteran Zach Merrett
item.description: The rival coach is leading the charge by sending a direct message to the star player.

item.title: Plans for data centre at heart of World Heritage-listed national park scrapped after community outcry
item.description: ‘It’s just hard to wrap my head around why this would be thought to be a suitable location.’

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis strike Saudi Arabia’s Abha airport in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport
item.description: Shocking footage published by Houthi-controlled media shows strikes battering Yemen’s airport earlier in the day, ending a period of ‘de-escalation’.

item.title: Axed England coach Brendon McCullum issues apology after ‘tap on the shoulder’
item.description: Brendon McCullum ‘can only say sorry’, but has found a ‘romantic’ silver lining to his sacking.

item.title: Tennis world baffled as Alex de Minaur secretly weds long-time partner Katie Boulter during Wimbledon final
item.description: ‘He really didn’t have much belief he would make the final kind of tells it’s own story.’

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump floats fee on cargo using Strait of Hormuz as ceasefire with Iran sinks
item.description: ‘We’ll become the guardian of the strait ... And we should be reimbursed’.

item.title: Worker dies after going overboard from Princess cruise ship
item.description: The ship was mid-voyage when the tragedy occurred.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Logan breaks silence on Jason’s shock finale decision
item.description: Logan has opened up about it ‘not really making sense’ and has shared a surprising dating update.

item.title: Hot honey craze: Nutritionist shares three healthier takes on the viral food trend
item.description: From burgers to pizza, these hot honey recipes put a healthier twist on the viral trend.

item.title: Sam Neill’s tragic death: Rebecca Gibney’s heartbreaking admission after actor’s passing
item.description: ‘I never told you.’

item.title: Mould find prompts recall on 10L Mt Ossa Australian Spring Water boxes sold at Woolworths in Qld and NSW
item.description: ‘It might be worth opening it and having a good look before drinking it.’

item.title: Paradise Country Tasmanian devil Mary still recovering after escape into Gold Coast bushland
item.description: Nearly a month after her dramatic rescue, Mary is making progress, but is not fit for the public yet.

item.title: Jarome Luai’s sudden exit confirmed as Benji Marshall slams rumours of relationship breakdown
item.description: ‘I’m a guy who respects respect.’

item.title: Queensland homeowner captures carpet python on door camera
item.description: ‘At the bottom of the camera, it even said it’s a person.’

item.title: One million Aussies have cancer with under-40s rates rising, Australian Institute of Health and Welfare data shows
item.description: The new data has shown the most common cancers as well as the most deadly.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese to create artificial intelligence office and national standards
item.description: The government claims it will be the world’s first national framework.

item.title: Heartwarming act for Queensland family who lost $42K to collapsed tiny home builder
item.description: ‘It just blew our minds. We couldn’t believe it.’

item.title: Adelaide mum's life-saving cancer surgery in limbo over $50,000 shortfall
item.description: ‘My greatest fear if I don’t get the surgery would be palliative care and dying.’

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Dramatic footage shows moment dogwalkers unleash pets on attacker
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out Of Here! coming to Channel Seven in 2027
item.description: An exciting new chapter is coming for one of television’s most talked-about franchises.

item.title: Mystery bidder buys T-rex nicknamed ‘Gus’ for eyewatering sum
item.description: The 67-million-year-old fossil, nicknamed ‘Gus’, is now the most expensive set of dinosaur bones ever auctioned off.

item.title: New baby announced on Melbourne breakfast radio show Fifi, Fev & Nick
item.description: ‘I’ve got a little exciting announcement myself.’

item.title: Three healthy one-pan family dinners making dinner (and clean up) easier
item.description: Less mess, more flavour. These nutritious one-pan dinners are perfect for busy weeknights.

item.title: US passes bill to ‘ditch the switch’ and make daylight saving time permanent
item.description: The Sunshine Protection Act now heads to the Senate with bi-partisan support.

item.title: Albanese reveals world-first AI standards set to hit parliament next year
item.description: ‘This world leading framework is about Australia choosing to shape the future rather than letting the future of AI shape us.’

item.title: Record low? Not on our watch, say Wallabies
item.description: ‘We’re on the cusp of being a really good team.’

item.title: Veteran rocker Jennifer Finch of L7 sidelined from farewell tour after brain cancer diagnosis
item.description: The musician now requires extensive medical care, rehabilitation and in-home support.

item.title: Ivan Cleary draws line through coaching both Penrith and NSW next year
item.description: The four-time premiership coach has only one thing on his mind ... and he’s going to give it his all.

item.title: Taco Bell under investigation as diarrhoea-causing parasite cyclosporiasis outbreak grows
item.description: A popular food chain is under investigation over claims it may be linked to the rapid spread of a parasite which can cause ‘explosive’ diarrhoea, which is now estimated to be impacting more than 7000 people.

item.title: Family reveals heartbreaking burden carried by Greenbank hit-and-run victim Tamatea ‘Tama’ Harrison before his death
item.description: ‘He didn’t deserve what happened. None of us can believe he’s gone.’

item.title: Teen accused of Brisbane school stabbing granted bail as court hears alleged attack was retaliation over social media video
item.description: New claims about what unfolded in the lead-up to the alleged incident have been heard in court.

item.title: ‘Coward act’: Family of Greenbank hit-and-run victim Tama Harrison urges driver to come forward
item.description: ‘I couldn’t even say my last goodbyes to him.’

item.title: Middle East latest: Iran threatens to halt all Mideast energy exports after US reimposes its blockade on Iran
item.description: The threats from Tehran came as the US intensified its airstrike campaign on Wednesday, pushing the region back towards all-out war.

item.title: TikToker allegedly steals groceries from supermarkets and cooks them for online clicks
item.description: The man allegedly steals hundreds of dollars in groceries and cooks them up for his followers.

item.title: Federal government scrambles to reassure Australians over plan to increase pesticides on berries at farms
item.description: The farming chemicals regulator claims the pesticide levels would be safe despite critics raising doubts.

item.title: Reform UK calls for 'full security' for MP after Ann Widdecombe’s murder
item.description: Nigel Farage's party is demanding extra cash for politicians' security following the killing of former MP and prominent party member Ann Widdecombe.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: ‘It doesn’t make sense’: Como resident told to pay up to remove disused Telstra box on council-owned verge
item.description: A Como resident has been told he will need to pay if he wants an old disconnected Telstra box on his verge removed, even though he doesn’t own the equipment or the land.

item.title: Argentina stun England in pulsating World Cup semi-final
item.description: The champs are back in the final and will now aim to defend their title against Spain.

item.title: Trump backflips on ICE traffic stops despite deadly shootings
item.description: The agency’s aggressive tactics are once again under scrutiny after an ICE officer killed a driver from Colombia.

item.title: US bombards Iran for fifth day as Iranian leaders say negotiations off the table
item.description: Hostilities are keeping ships from passing through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Football superstar Jude Bellingham accused of ‘disgusting’ act following England’s World Cup loss to Argentina
item.description: Tensions exploded at the end of the match and fans have unleashed on an England villain.

item.title: England coach Thomas Tuchel comes under fire after Argentina collapse
item.description: ‘That’s him saying he didn’t believe in his team.’

item.title: Argentina players risk sanctions after celebrating World Cup win over England with Falkland Islands banner
item.description: The defending champions have courted controversy with FIFA moments after reaching the World Cup final.

item.title: Grim details emerge after woman found dead in Rockhampton CBD
item.description: The homicide squad has been called in to probe the 32-year-old’s death.

item.title: NSW Police declare new era in organised crime as assassins film executions with drones and mobile phones
item.description: ‘Hello, this is the Albanian mafia; we have footage of Mr. Cheung’s execution by gangs today in Carlingford.’

item.title: Umpires meet league officials after AFL’s own website posts ‘clickbait’ headline about Matt Stevic
item.description: The match officials think it’s ‘disrespectful’ and have told the league they are not happy.

item.title: JD Vance admits Trump administration ‘screwed up’ over Epstein files
item.description: The US vice president addressed the matter on Joe Rogan’s podcast.

item.title: Why notorious ‘Balenciaga bikie’ Tarek Zahed violently attacked security guard outside Melbourne nightclub
item.description: Tarek Zahed was fined hundreds of dollars on Thursday after putting the man in hospital with the magistrate issuing him an ultimatum.

item.title: Fremantle coach tells out-of-favour big man Sean Darcy how to return to AFL team
item.description: ‘I’ve spoken to Sean. He’s disappointed.’

item.title: Sam Neill’s cause of death revealed as pneumonia by his longtime agent
item.description: The beloved actor died earlier this week in a Sydney hospital with his family revealing the loss was ‘sudden and unexpected’.

item.title: Unwanted NRL superstar Jarome Luai makes raw admission about premature Tigers exit
item.description: ‘I’m a man, I’m a man just like you.’

item.title: Toyota Tundra recalled
item.description: Over 1000 locally remanufactured Toyota Tundras are being recalled as drivers may not be able to restart their vehicles after being turned off.

item.title: Young Canberra gun Noah Martin reveals brutal cost of double syndesmosis injury: ‘Dark times’
item.description: ‘I don’t know how she did, but she got through.’

item.title: More than 500 feared dead after two boats carrying refugees sink off Myanmar
item.description: Refugees are continuing to make perilous maritime journeys in search of safety and better opportunities.

item.title: Aussie champion Georgia Godwin forced to scrap move from repertiore after traumatic Achilles injury
item.description: The gold medallist has picked herself up from her darkest days but still fears the skill that changed her life.

item.title: Record crowd roars for Sam Kerr’s ‘full circle’ NWSL homecoming in Gotham FC win
item.description: The Matildas superstar’s footballer wife had competition cheering from the stands on a historic night.

item.title: PM urged to keep politics out of Australians’ super after calling $4.5 trillion pool a national asset
item.description: ‘Don’t touch the super complex, don’t direct it, don’t tell it where to go.’

item.title: Essendon cop $20,000 whack from AFL after racking up five umpire contact charges
item.description: The Bombers are licking their wounds all over again after the AFL has issued a new statement.

item.title: Cyclist rushed to hospital after eastern brown snake trapped in bike chain bites rider in Burringbar
item.description: Her last day on holidays took a dangerous turn on a popular rail trail.

item.title: 2026 Renault Master review: Quick drive
item.description: For commercial buyers needing space and security, big vans are the answer. But is the all-new Renault Master now the segment leader?

item.title: Ford Transit Custom and Tourneo recalled
item.description: Features in certain 2025-26 Ford Transit Custom and Tourneo models, such as the blind-spot indicator and power windows, may not work due to a software issue.

item.title: Ferrari considered pop-up headlights for its new Testarossa
item.description: The 849 Testarossa’s black front fascia is Ferrari’s solution to a much-loved design feature it couldn’t make work on a global production car.

item.title: South Australian MP Tony Pasin injured and staffer hospitalised after Tasmanian oyster tour hits a sandbar
item.description: The South Australian politician had been touring an oyster farm in Tasmania when the incident unfolded.

item.title: Chinese brand stepping in to honour Aussie importer's previous cashback offers amid messy court battle
item.description: Outstanding cashback offers claimed under Xpeng's independent local importer will be paid by the automaker after its move to factory distribution.

item.title: Female cop hospitalised after allegedly being attacked by man at Sydney’s Mascot police station
item.description: She suffered serious facial injuries and was rushed to hospital.

item.title: Richmond put a line through untried rising star Josh Smillie’s 2026 season
item.description: The 20-year-old is still yet to make his debut after two years and will be waiting for some time yet.

item.title: SA Police shut down speculation over ‘child’s skull’ found in shipping container and issue warning over social media
item.description: South Australia Police delivered the unprecedented message after they were forced to go public with two big investigations this week.

item.title: Greyhound investigates after driver allegedly caught scrolling videos while driving on Queensland’s Bruce Highway
item.description: The witness claims the coach repeatedly drifted towards the edge of the road, leaving her fearing for her life.

item.title: Former Royal Flying Doctor Service pilot Rodney McRedmond admits to unlawful sexual relationship with a child
item.description: Rodney McRedmond, a retired pilot who worked for the charity for decades, has pleaded guilty to an unlawful sexual relationship with a child under 17.

item.title: WA Health reports state’s first meningococcal death of 2026
item.description: The tragic news was announced on Wednesday, three months after authorities issued an alert for travellers.

item.title: Fresh plea as US search for missing Melbourne woman Sally Contarino nears one-month mark
item.description: The 26-year-old never boarded her planned flight home after a solo trip to the US.

item.title: Furious Ross Lyon holds up St Kilda-Geelong game for lengthy spray: ‘He’ll get a fine for that’
item.description: ‘All of the officials have been ordered back, not to come near the players, not to talk to them.’

item.title: BHP port workers take action in historic Pilbara strike
item.description: Hundreds of workers downed tools over a wage dispute.

item.title: Devastating news for families of Aussie teens Bianca Jones and Holly Bowles who died from methanol poisoning in Laos
item.description: The 19-year-old girls died while holidaying in Laos after consuming drinks in a tourist town.

item.title: Tsunami alert lifted after earthquake shakes New Zealand’s South Island
item.description: The country’s lower South Island has been rattled by a magnitude 5.9 earthquake that briefly sparked a coastal evacuation alert.

item.title: Star midfielder Max Holmes in agony as another injury ‘tragedy unfolds’ for Geelong
item.description: ‘This right here could be season over.’
